findings.message: New redis-exporter service added but no corresponding Prometheus scrape job configured. The exporter will run but metrics will not be collected.
findings.suggestion:
Add a scrape job for redis-exporter in infra/observability/prometheus/prometheus.yml under scrape_configs:
  - job_name: redis
    static_configs:
      - targets: ["redis-exporter:9121"]
